sections.title: AI-Powered Patient Communication
sections.subtitle: See how our AI assistant handles appointment scheduling automatically
sections.description: Experience seamless appointment scheduling with our intelligent AI assistant that understands natural language and automatically books your preferred time slots.

messages.text: Hi, I need to schedule a dental cleaning appointment
Hello! I'd be happy to help you schedule a dental cleaning. Let me check our available slots for you.

I have availability this week. Would you prefer:

📅 Tuesday, March 15th at 2:00 PM
📅 Thursday, March 17th at 10:00 AM
📅 Friday, March 18th at 3:30 PM
Thursday at 10 AM works for me
Perfect! I've scheduled your dental cleaning appointment for Thursday, March 17th at 10:00 AM. The appointment will take approximately 45 minutes.
Great! I'll send you a confirmation message and a reminder 24 hours before your appointment. Is there anything else I can help you with?
You're welcome! We look forward to seeing you on March 17th. Have a great day! 😊

reviews.name: Dr. Sarah Martinez
reviews.content: Dentagia has transformed how we run our practice. The AI-powered scheduling alone saves us 10 hours per week, and our patient satisfaction scores have never been higher. The cloud-based system means we can access everything from anywhere.

reviews.name: Dr. Michael Chen
reviews.content: Switching to Dentagia was the best decision we made. The patient management system is intuitive, billing is automated, and the analytics help us understand our practice better. Our revenue has increased by 35% since implementation.

reviews.name: Emily Rodriguez
reviews.content: The support team is incredible, and the platform is so easy to use. We've reduced administrative time by 50% and our team loves how streamlined everything is. Dentagia truly understands what dental practices need.
